title: CS 7641 Machine Learning Assignments
summary: Four machine learning assignments covering supervised learning (A1-SL), unsupervised learning and dimensionality reduction (A3-USL), and reinforcement learning on MDPs (A4-MDPs). The project uses scikit-learn classifiers and clustering algorithms, plus mdptoolbox for MDP environments. A1-SL has a shared utility module used by all five classifiers; A3-USL and A4-MDPs are fully independent chains.
instructionPreview: This repository implements four graduate-level machine-learning programming assignments covering supervised learning, randomized optimization, unsupervised learning and dimensionality reduction, and reinforcement learning on MDPs. The framework uses scikit-learn classifiers, clustering algorithms, dimensionality reduction techniques, and mdptoolbox for MDP-based RL environments.
instruction:
This repository implements four graduate-level machine-learning programming assignments covering supervised learning, randomized optimization, unsupervised learning and dimensionality reduction, and reinforcement learning on MDPs. The framework uses scikit-learn classifiers, clustering algorithms, dimensionality reduction techniques, and mdptoolbox for MDP-based RL environments.

Your working directory is `/workspace`. The project code is already present.
You need to implement all the modules and features listed below so that all tests pass.

## Modules to Implement

The following modules need to be implemented or substantially built out:

- **A1-SL (Supervised Learning)** (`A1-SL/`): This module contains training pipelines for multiple classifiers — Decision Tree, k-Nearest Neighbors, Support Vector Machine, Neural Network, and Boosted Tree. Each classifier module handles hyperparameter grid search via cross-validation, model fitting, ROC-AUC scoring on train/test sets, and optional model complexity/validation curve generation. The shared utility module provides data loading with scaling, validation curve computation, learning curve plotting, grid search export, and specialized visualizations. (~7 files, ~10 functions to implement)

- **A3-USL (Unsupervised Learning & Dimensionality Reduction)** (`A3-USL/`): This module implements K-Means and Expectation-Maximization clustering pipelines with comprehensive metric evaluation, plus four dimensionality reduction techniques (PCA, ICA, Random Projection, Locally Linear Embedding) with reconstruction error analysis. The clustering module benchmarks estimators across varying cluster counts, computing quality metrics and generating comparison visualizations. (~2 files, ~8 functions to implement)

- **A4-MDPs (Markov Decision Processes)** (`A4-MDPs/`): This module implements Policy Iteration on forest management MDPs. The run_episodes function simulates a Forest MDP under a fixed policy, handling fire probability, state transitions, and reward accumulation. The run_forest function runs the full PI pipeline across parameter grids and generates heatmap visualizations of rewards, iterations, and runtimes. (~1 file, ~2 functions to implement)

## Test-Coupled Signatures

The following functions are called directly by the test suite. You must implement them with these exact signatures:

- `train_DTree(filename, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, full_param=False, debug=False, numFolds=10, njobs=-1, scalar=1, make_graphs=False, pDTree={})` in `A1-SL/DecisionTree.py` — Fit a DecisionTreeClassifier using provided hyperparameters (or GridSearchCV if pDTree is empty), compute weighted ROC-AUC scores on train and test sets, and return `(elapsed_time, train_score, test_score)`.

- `train_knn(filename, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, full_param=False, debug=False, numFolds=10, njobs=-1, scalar=1, make_graphs=False, pknn={})` in `A1-SL/kNearestNeighbor.py` — Fit a KNeighborsClassifier using provided hyperparameters (or GridSearchCV if pknn is empty), compute weighted ROC-AUC scores on train and test sets, and return `(elapsed_time, train_score, test_score)`.

- `bench_k_means(estimator, labels, name, data, sample_size, n_clusters, random_state, filename, verbose=False)` in `A3-USL/clustering.py` — Fit the given clustering estimator to data, then compute and return an 11-tuple of metrics: `(fit_time, homogeneity, completeness, v_measure, adjusted_rand, adjusted_mutual_info, fowlkes_mallows, silhouette, davies_bouldin, calinski_harabasz, inertia)`.

- `run_episodes(policy, S, R, p, num_episodes, num_resets)` in `A4-MDPs/VI-Forest.py` — Simulate a Forest MDP for num_resets independent trials each of num_episodes steps. At each step, with probability p a fire occurs (state resets to 0 with no reward); otherwise collect reward R[state][policy[state]] and if action is 1 (Cut) reset state to 0. Return mean total reward across all resets as a float.

- `train_svm(filename, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, solver='rbf', full_param=False, debug=False, numFolds=10, njobs=-1, scalar=1, make_graphs=False, pSVM={})` in `A1-SL/SVM.py` — Fit an SVC using provided hyperparameters (or GridSearchCV if pSVM is empty), compute weighted ROC-AUC scores on train and test sets, and return `(elapsed_time, train_score, test_score)`.

- `train_BTree(filename, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, full_param=False, debug=False, numFolds=10, njobs=-1, scalar=1, make_graphs=False, pBTree={})` in `A1-SL/BoostedTree.py` — Fit an AdaBoostClassifier with a DecisionTree base estimator using provided hyperparameters (or GridSearchCV if pBTree is empty), compute weighted ROC-AUC scores on train and test sets, and return `(elapsed_time, train_score, test_score)`.

- `bench_EM(estimator, labels, name, data, sample_size, n_clusters, random_state, filename, verbose=False)` in `A3-USL/clustering.py` — Fit the given GaussianMixture estimator to data, then compute and return a 13-tuple of metrics: `(fit_time, homogeneity, completeness, v_measure, adjusted_rand, adjusted_mutual_info, fowlkes_mallows, silhouette, davies_bouldin, calinski_harabasz, aic, bic, score)`.

moduleDag.description: Four machine learning assignments covering supervised learning (A1-SL), unsupervised learning and dimensionality reduction (A3-USL), and reinforcement learning on MDPs (A4-MDPs). The project uses scikit-learn classifiers and clustering algorithms, plus mdptoolbox for MDP environments. A1-SL has a shared utility module used by all five classifiers; A3-USL and A4-MDPs are fully independent chains.

nodes.label: A1-SL Shared Utilities
nodes.description: Provides data loading with min-max or standard scaling, GridSearchCV result export to CSV, learning curve plotting, validation curve computation across hyperparameter ranges, and specialized SVM/BoostedTree heatmap visualization helpers. All five A1-SL classifier modules import and call these utilities.

nodes.label: A3-USL Clustering (K-Means & EM)
nodes.description: Implements bench_k_means (fits KMeans estimator and returns an 11-tuple of quality metrics: fit_time, homogeneity, completeness, V-measure, ARI, AMI, Fowlkes-Mallows, silhouette, Davies-Bouldin, Calinski-Harabasz, inertia) and bench_EM (same for GaussianMixture, returning a 13-tuple that adds AIC, BIC, and log-likelihood score).

nodes.label: A3-USL Dimensionality Reduction
nodes.description: Implements four dimensionality reduction pipelines — PCA (ulPCA), FastICA (ulICA), Gaussian Random Projection (ulGRP), and Locally Linear Embedding (ulLLE) — each fitting the technique to data and generating explained-variance or reconstruction-error visualizations to guide component count selection.

nodes.label: A4-MDPs Value Iteration — Forest
nodes.description: Implements run_episodes (simulates Forest MDP for num_resets independent trials of num_episodes steps, applying fire probability and Cut/Wait action transitions, returning mean total reward) and run_forest (runs the full Value Iteration pipeline across gamma/epsilon grids with heatmap visualizations of reward, iterations, and runtime).

nodes.label: A1-SL Decision Tree Classifier
nodes.description: Implements train_DTree: fits a DecisionTreeClassifier via GridSearchCV (or directly from pDTree params if provided), computes weighted ROC-AUC on train and test sets, and returns (elapsed_time, train_score, test_score).

nodes.label: A1-SL k-Nearest Neighbors Classifier
nodes.description: Implements train_knn: fits a KNeighborsClassifier via GridSearchCV (or directly from pknn params), computes weighted ROC-AUC on train and test sets, and returns (elapsed_time, train_score, test_score).

nodes.label: A1-SL Support Vector Machine Classifier
nodes.description: Implements train_svm: fits an SVC (with probability=True) for a specified kernel via GridSearchCV (or pSVM params), computes weighted ROC-AUC on train and test sets, and returns (elapsed_time, train_score, test_score).

nodes.label: A1-SL Neural Network Classifier
nodes.description: Implements the neural network training pipeline using MLPClassifier with GridSearchCV over hidden layer sizes, learning rate, and regularization hyperparameters, computing weighted ROC-AUC on train and test sets.

nodes.label: A4-MDPs Policy Iteration — Forest
nodes.description: Implements run_episodes (same Forest MDP simulation as VI-Forest) and run_forest (runs the Policy Iteration pipeline across gamma/epsilon grids using mdptoolbox PolicyIteration, generating equivalent heatmap visualizations). Structurally mirrors VI-Forest with PI as the solver.

nodes.label: A1-SL Boosted Tree (AdaBoost) Classifier
nodes.description: Implements train_BTree: builds an AdaBoostClassifier with a DecisionTreeClassifier base estimator, runs GridSearchCV over both ensemble (n_estimators, learning_rate) and tree (max_depth, criterion, ccp_alpha) hyperparameters (or uses pBTree params), computes weighted ROC-AUC on train and test sets, and returns (elapsed_time, train_score, test_score).

edges.label: DecisionTree.py imports util and calls util.save_gridsearch_to_csv, util.compute_vc, util.plot_learning_curve
kNearestNeighbor.py imports util and calls the same shared visualization and export helpers
SVM.py imports util and calls util.svm_rbf_C_Gamma_viz, util.compute_vc, util.plot_learning_curve, util.save_gridsearch_to_csv
NeuralNetwork.py imports util and calls the shared validation curve and learning curve plotting helpers
BoostedTree.py imports util and calls util.boost_lr_vs_nest, util.compute_vc, util.plot_learning_curve, util.save_gridsearch_to_csv

AdaBoostClassifier uses DecisionTreeClassifier as its base estimator; understanding and correctly parameterising the DT (ccp_alpha, max_depth, criterion, max_leaf_nodes, splitter) is prerequisite to configuring the boosted variant's grid search

PI-Forest replicates the run_episodes function from VI-Forest and follows the same run_forest pipeline structure; Value Iteration (simpler, no policy rollback) provides the implementation template that Policy Iteration extends
